description: Deterministic output verification plan -- procedure for comparing frame checksums across multiple render runs on the same hardware to verify C-05 (deterministic output). Covers seeding strategy for any randomized elements. Addresses TC-06 (virtualized clock produces deterministic output -- render same composition 3 times, compare checksums).
notes: Tier 6 validation plan. Covers C-05 and TC-06. Delivers src/engine/determinism.ts module with verifyDeterminism(), extractFrameMd5s(), compareFrameMd5s(), computePerFramePsnr(), DeterministicRng. CLI sub-command deferred to OBJ-083. Uses post-hoc framemd5 comparison (no Orchestrator modification). Pass criteria: byte-identical MD5s expected; PSNR >= 60dB fallback acceptable.
